findings.description: Section s12 (テンプレート) contains a replacement character table with 17 entries in the first column, but the hints only include 7 of them. The following replacement characters are missing from hints: $PROP_LNAME$, $PROP_PNAME$, $PROP_TYPE$, $GETTER$, $SETTER$, #FIELD_ANNOTATION#, #PARAM_TO_FIELD#, #FIELD_TO_MAP#, #SETTER_ANNOTATIONS#, #PROPERTY_NAME_ANNOTATION#
findings.source_evidence: Source replacement character table (===========================  =======================================) lists: $PROP_LNAME$, $PROP_PNAME$, $PROP_TYPE$, $GETTER$, $SETTER$, #FIELD_ANNOTATION#, #PARAM_TO_FIELD#, #FIELD_TO_MAP#, #SETTER_ANNOTATIONS#, #PROPERTY_NAME_ANNOTATION# — none of these appear in s12 hints
